claim: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) Structural reform risks being reversed once political consensus shifts, as happened in Poland (2016-2019), wasting its equity gains and the government's political capital unless entrenched by a legally binding mechanism stronger than an informal multi-party pact.
interest: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the concern(s) raised by kormanyzati_reformrealizmus, fuggetlen_szakpolitikai_kutatomuhely
value: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) a trade-off between the scenario's stated goal and the concern raised
fear: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the benefit claimed will not materialise as described
assumption: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) the claim's premise holds under implementation as designed
empirical_uncertainty: (HU fordítás nem elérhető) not independently graded here — see the evidence layer
